verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer immediately: "use an ORM/query-builder for most new Node APIs"; B also answers early but more broadly: "default to a typed query layer".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more usefully by situation: "solo/small team shipping CRUD fast → Prisma... SQL-comfortable team... → Drizzle... Analytics... → raw SQL"; A mostly surveys tradeoffs after "use an ORM/query-builder".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it maps common scenarios directly to Prisma, Drizzle, or raw SQL.
